text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today marks the start of a long and arduous
journey in the Twinkle Series for me and my
trainee. Her name is...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
My name is Satono Diamond. It's nice to meet
you.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
One day, I will shine as brilliantly as a diamond
and make history by breaking the Satono family's
jinx... That is my dream.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
As such, I'm counting on you to work with me on
turning my dream into a reality!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so begin my days challenging the Twinkle
Series with <chrname>!
